sentence: 悠游卡没钱了，需要去便利店加值。
pinyin: Yōuyóu kǎ méi qián le, xūyào qù biànlì diàn jiā zhí.
english: My EasyCard is out of money—I need to go recharge it at a convenience store.

sentence: 这张信用卡的年费是三百元。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng xìnyòng kǎ de nián fèi shì sānbǎi yuán.
english: The annual fee for this credit card is three hundred yuan.

sentence: 中世纪的欧洲国王声称自己拥有神权。
pinyin: Zhōngshìjì de Ōuzhōu guówáng chēngchēng zìjǐ yōngyǒu shén quán.
english: Medieval European kings claimed to possess divine right.

meaning: to be trapped; to be stranded
sentence: 登山队员被困在山顶，等待救援。
pinyin: Dēngshān duìyuán bèi kùn zài shāndǐng, děngdài jiùyuán.
english: The mountaineers were trapped at the summit, waiting for rescue.

meaning: anew; from the beginning; (in poetry and song) repetition of a melody
sentence: 文件丢了，只好重头再写一遍。
pinyin: Wénjiàn diū le, zhǐhǎo chóng tóu zài xiě yī biàn.
english: The document was lost, so I had to start over and write it again from the beginning.
